markets.rules_secondary: Video of the Mar 2026 will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the Mar 2026 will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Please see full rules for more details.
